name: Moon gate (yuèliàngmén)
description: A circular garden gateway set in a short masonry wall: a vertical ring around an open round doorway in the x-y plane. The iconic Chinese moon gate marking a threshold between garden rooms.
placement_rules: Set into a garden wall on a path axis.
The round opening is left clear for passage.

chinese.notes: Pale stone ring in a vermilion wall.

japanese.notes: Stone ring in a timber wall.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.moon_gate.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: East-Asian (Japanese/Chinese) motif. Coherent in japanese/chinese (and fantasy). Out of place in Western, Gothic, Renaissance, Modern, Mediterranean buildings — use only if the building is East-Asian.
